query: SELECT a.id as agendamentoId, a.data, a.horaInicio, a.status, c.nome as cliente, t.id as tokenId, t.token, t.expiresAt, t.usadoEm FROM agendamentos a JOIN clientes c ON c.id = a.clienteId JOIN tokens_confirmacao t ON t.agendamentoId = a.id WHERE a.data >= CURDATE() AND t.usadoEm IS NULL AND t.expiresAt < NOW() AND a.status IN ('agendado', 'confirmado') ORDER BY a.data ASC;
